modules.functions: Request orchestration, draft generation workflow, file saving, submission metadata, and compatibility imports for split modules.
Build stable citation keys, extract publication years, and generate BibTeX entries from Zotero or external literature metadata.
Escape LaTeX special characters, normalize URLs, and render clickable line-breakable LaTeX links.
Locate local LaTeX tools, run xelatex/pdflatex and bibtex, write compile logs, and return PDF generation status.
Validate generated Markdown, LaTeX, BibTeX, PDF, URLs, math delimiters, bibliography links, and section alignment.
Search external scholarly metadata through Semantic Scholar, arXiv, Crossref, and optional SerpApi Google Scholar; clean, deduplicate, and normalize supplemental references.
Create Zotero clients from environment variables, list collections, read only selected collection items, and optionally sync supplemental external references back to Zotero.
Compute literature relevance and authority weights using idea overlap, citation counts, and EasyScholar journal rank metadata.
Build the strict publishable-outline prompt, including data description handling, dataset URL hints, section order, citation rules, and figure/table plan requirements.
